<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# All 4 slots filled. Let me check current state and try SPACE to submit.
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

# Check middle area colors
print("=== MIDDLE SLOTS ===")
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] in ['N', 'p', 'b', 'Y', 'g'] and n['pixels'] in [4, 16]:
        print(f"  id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Try SPACE to submit/confirm
print("\nTrying SPACE to submit...")
result = action(['SPACE'])
print(f"Result: {last_action_result}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
